messages.content: Which technology primarily responsible for defining the structure and content of a webpage. Choices: php, css, html, js
The technology primarily responsible for defining the structure and content of a webpage is HTML (Hypertext Markup Language).
Which is an example of web development tool. Choices: vs code, excel, illustrator, Photoshop
One example of a web development tool is Visual Studio Code (VS Code).
Which technology primarily used for adding interactivity and dynamic behavior to web pages. Choices: html, php, css, js
The technology primarily used for adding interactivity and dynamic behavior to web pages is JavaScript (JS).
Role of css in web dev. Choices: handling server side, styling and formatting pages,, client side scripts, databases

The role of CSS (Cascading Style Sheets) in web development is primarily for styling and formatting web pages. It is responsible for the visual presentation of a webpage, including aspects such as layout, typography, colors, and overall design. CSS allows developers to control the appearance and positioning of HTML elements, making web pages visually appealing and user-friendly. CSS is not involved in handling server-side tasks, client-side scripting, or database management.
Purpose of creating got branches. Choices: optimize web page load speed, manage different versions of cidenase, store large files, track website visitor analysis

The purpose of creating Git branches is to manage different versions of code and facilitate collaboration in software development projects. Git branches allow developers to work on different features or bug fixes without interfering with the main codebase. It helps maintain a clean and stable main branch while allowing separate branches for experimentation, testing, and development. Branches also facilitate code reviews and make it easier to merge changes back into the main branch once they are tested and verified. Therefore, managing different versions of code is the primary purpose of creating Git branches.
What is git primarily used for. Choices: connect database, create webpage layout, run serverside code, manage track change in code

Git is primarily used for managing and tracking changes in code. It is a version control system that allows developers to keep track of different versions of their codebase, collaborate with others, and easily merge changes. Git provides features such as branching, merging, and committing changes, making it easier to manage and track code modifications over time. It is not used to connect to databases, create webpage layouts, or run server-side code. Its main purpose is to manage and track changes in code.
Which file nformat define structure and content of a webpagr. Jpg, PDF, txt, html
The file format that defines the structure and content of a webpage is HTML (Hypertext Markup Language).
What web dev encompasses. Choices:design user interfaces for software, manage server side infrastructure, building web applications, creat mobile app

Web development encompasses building web applications, which involves designing and developing user interfaces for software that runs on the web. It also includes managing server-side infrastructure, such as setting up databases, configuring servers, and handling server-side programming tasks. However, web development does not directly involve creating mobile apps, as that falls under mobile app development, which is a separate discipline.
What is needed to construct a simple webpage? Choices: server and database, domain name registration, text editor and web browser, internet connection

To construct a simple webpage, you primarily need a text editor and a web browser. The text editor allows you to write the HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code that forms the structure, style, and behavior of the webpage. The web browser is used to view and test the webpage. 

While a server and database may be required for more complex webpages or dynamic functionality, they are not necessarily needed for a simple static webpage. Domain name registration is also not required for constructing a webpage, although it is necessary if you want to publish the webpage on the internet with a custom domain name. An internet connection is necessary to access online resources and publish the webpage.
